items.title: S01E01 - Awakening
items.summary: Six teenagers are awakened from hibernation to discover that they are aboard a spaceship with no knowledge of how they got there and that they are under attack by an alien spacecraft.

infolabels.title: Awakening
infolabels.plot: Six teenagers are awakened from hibernation to discover that they are aboard a spaceship with no knowledge of how they got there and that they are under attack by an alien spacecraft.

items.title: S01E02 - Lullaby
items.summary: After becoming adjusted to life aboard Deepwater, the crew learns that they must go back into cryogenic hibernation to complete their maturation process.

infolabels.title: Lullaby
infolabels.plot: After becoming adjusted to life aboard Deepwater, the crew learns that they must go back into cryogenic hibernation to complete their maturation process.

items.title: S01E03 - Legacy
items.summary: The chain of command on the Deepwater is threatened when Bren learns that he has been chosen to be in charge of the ship, instead of the civilian Reb.

infolabels.title: Legacy
infolabels.plot: The chain of command on the Deepwater is threatened when Bren learns that he has been chosen to be in charge of the ship, instead of the civilian Reb.

items.title: S01E04 - Reflections
items.summary: The crew encounters a ship exactly like the Deepwater---but piloted by an older Reb, who advises them to abandon their mission.

infolabels.title: Reflections
infolabels.plot: The crew encounters a ship exactly like the Deepwater---but piloted by an older Reb, who advises them to abandon their mission.

items.title: S01E05 - Plague
items.summary: The deadly Pandora virus is released aboard the ship, immediately infecting the entire crew.

infolabels.title: Plague
infolabels.plot: The deadly Pandora virus is released aboard the ship, immediately infecting the entire crew.

items.title: S01E06 - Cycles
items.summary: The ship encounters a spacecraft, apparently adrift, with only one occupant---a female child who has a profound effect on Yuna.

infolabels.title: Cycles
infolabels.plot: The ship encounters a spacecraft, apparently adrift, with only one occupant---a female child who has a profound effect on Yuna.

items.title: S01E07 - Refugee
items.summary: After encountering a lifepod drifting in space, the crew of Deepwater must fight off a "soul vampire."

infolabels.title: Refugee
infolabels.plot: After encountering a lifepod drifting in space, the crew of Deepwater must fight off a "soul vampire."

items.title: S01E08 - Hunt
items.summary: A message announcing the eradication of the Pandora virus and an invitation to a resort spa are not what they seem to be.

infolabels.title: Hunt
infolabels.plot: A message announcing the eradication of the Pandora virus and an invitation to a resort spa are not what they seem to be.

items.title: S01E09 - Fugue
items.summary: Zak creates a cyber-neural transmitter to induce “prexes”--spacial events with unforseen consequences--but he can't contol it.

infolabels.title: Fugue
infolabels.plot: Zak creates a cyber-neural transmitter to induce “prexes”--spacial events with unforseen consequences--but he can't contol it.

items.title: S01E10 - Siege
items.summary: After encountering a huge object drifting in space, the ship is boarded by an alien being that demands to be given one of the crew.

infolabels.title: Siege
infolabels.plot: After encountering a huge object drifting in space, the ship is boarded by an alien being that demands to be given one of the crew.

items.title: S01E11 - Prime
items.summary: A computer virus results in a malevolent being called the Mentor, who threatens to destroy nearly all of the gene samples in the Gene Bank.

infolabels.title: Prime
infolabels.plot: A computer virus results in a malevolent being called the Mentor, who threatens to destroy nearly all of the gene samples in the Gene Bank.

items.title: S01E12 - Infestation
items.summary: The ship and crew face trouble when a metal-eating organism attaches itself to Deepwater.

infolabels.title: Infestation
infolabels.plot: The ship and crew face trouble when a metal-eating organism attaches itself to Deepwater.

items.title: S01E13 - Aurora
items.summary: The crew receives a message from a beacon in space.

infolabels.title: Aurora
infolabels.plot: The crew receives a message from a beacon in space.
